sentences.text: But you must lend me your lantern, because the night is very dark, and I might fall.
'I am sorry,' said the Miller, 'but it is my new lantern, and I would be sad if it broke.
'Never mind, I will go without it,' said little Hans, and he put on his coat and cap.
What a terrible storm it was!
